market_size.fact: Australian Fruit & Vegetable Wholesaling industry is valued at A$12.6 billion in 2026, with 1,474 businesses.
market_size.source_title: IBISWorld — Fruit and Vegetable Wholesaling in Australia

llm_cost_decline.fact: LLM inference costs declined 10x annually. GPT-4-equivalent performance now costs $0.40/million tokens vs $20 in late 2022 — a 50x drop. Price to match GPT-4 on PhD-level benchmarks fell 40x per year.
llm_cost_decline.source_title: Epoch AI — LLM Inference Price Trends

invoice_ocr_roi.fact: AP automation reduces cost per invoice from $12–$30 to $1–$5 (60–80% reduction). Processing time drops from 15 min to 3 min per invoice. Error rates fall from 1–3% to 0.1–0.5%. Most teams see positive ROI within 6 months.
invoice_ocr_roi.source_title: Artsyl — Invoice Processing Automation ROI Guide

ai_sales_coaching.fact: Companies using AI sales coaching report 25% boost in productivity and 15% drop in sales costs. Teams using Gong AI achieved 26–35% higher win rates. 83% of AI-enabled sales teams saw revenue growth vs 66% without AI (Salesforce).

warehouse_automation_roi.fact: AMRs deliver payback in under 24 months with ROI above 250%. Picking automation sees returns within 2–3 years. Over 450,000 logistics robots sold globally in 2025, up from 75,000 in 2019 (500% increase).

bcg_ai_supply_chain.fact: One global industrial goods company unlocked a 2 percentage-point EBITDA boost in just two years by embedding agentic AI into daily workflows. Warehouse automation market expected to reach $41B by 2027 (CAGR ~15%).
bcg_ai_supply_chain.source_title: BCG — Amplify Your Warehouse Automation ROI
